sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34837" key="e)nantiobouli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναντῐο-βουλία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n34837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contrary purpose</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:201:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">201.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
